rooting.theme: This is becoming who you are

rituals.title: Every journey begins here.
rituals.subtitle: Today is the only day you need.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
You are allowed
to pause.
arrival.subheading: Before the day begins — one breath.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
Not everything deserves
your attention right now.
release.field_placeholder: Leave something here. It won't follow you.

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
One slow breath
changes the room.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Nothing else.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What matters most
right now?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What small thing feels
possible for you today?

home_card.headline: Every journey begins here. Today is yours.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write down 3 things asking for your attention right now. Cross out the two least important. The one that remains — that is yours for today.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Clarity is the first act of self-care. Writing it down makes it real. You don't need to fix anything yet — seeing it clearly is enough for today.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What has been hardest to begin?

rituals.notification_copy: Every journey begins somewhere. Today is your somewhere.
rituals.evening_reflection: What did today ask of you that you didn't expect?

completion_message.heading:
You came back
to yourself today.
completion_message.subheading: A quiet beginning still matters.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: something shifts when you show up twice in a row.

rituals.title: You came back.
rituals.subtitle: That is already more than yesterday.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
You returned.
That matters.
arrival.subheading: Coming back is the whole practice.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
Yesterday doesn't need
to follow you here.
release.field_placeholder: What did yesterday leave with you?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
One breath.
Just one.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Nothing else.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What does showing up
mean for you today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What does coming back
again and again
tell you about yourself?

home_card.headline: You came back. That is already something real.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Before checking your phone, write one sentence about something you're looking forward to — even something small. One sentence is enough.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Starting the day with even one forward-facing thought shifts the nervous system out of threat mode. It is small, and it is real.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What made you come back today?

rituals.notification_copy: Yesterday you showed up. Today is waiting.
rituals.evening_reflection: What felt different about today because you showed up?

completion_message.heading:
Two days.
That is momentum.
completion_message.subheading: It builds quietly from here.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: the breath changes things. Day 3 is about what one slow breath actually does.

rituals.title: One breath changes the room.
rituals.subtitle: You don't need to do more.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
The room is quieter
than you think.
arrival.subheading: You are here. That is enough for now.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
You don't have to
carry this alone.
release.field_placeholder: What feels too heavy right now?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Your breath
is always here.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Let your shoulders drop.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What would feel like
a relief today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
Where in your body
do you feel the tension
most right now?

home_card.headline: One breath changes more than you think. Come find out.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Set a timer for 2 minutes. Breathe slowly. When thoughts arrive, let them pass. You are not solving anything — just breathing.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Slow breathing activates your body's calm response. Two minutes is enough to change your state. You don't have to believe it — just try it once.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: When during the day does your breathing tighten without you noticing?

rituals.notification_copy: The chaos is still there. So is this breath.
rituals.evening_reflection: Where did you find a moment of stillness today, even a small one?

completion_message.heading:
The breath
always helps.
completion_message.subheading: Calm lives inside the pause.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on letting go of what you cannot hold. Day 4 is about setting things down.

rituals.title: You don't have to hold it all.
rituals.subtitle: Some things can wait.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
You can put things
down here.
arrival.subheading: This space asks nothing of you.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What have you been
gripping too tightly?
release.field_placeholder: What are you afraid to let go of?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe out
what you can't control.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Release on the exhale.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What can you actually
do today — nothing more?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would today feel like
if you carried
a little less of it?

home_card.headline: You don't have to hold it all today. Something can wait.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write down one thing you're worrying about that you cannot control. Fold the paper or close the note. Set it aside. It will still be there later — but you don't have to hold it right now.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Naming what you cannot control and physically setting it aside interrupts the worry loop. It won't solve the problem. But it gives your nervous system a rest.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What are you holding right now that you never agreed to carry?

rituals.notification_copy: Some things can wait today. This can't.
rituals.evening_reflection: What felt lighter by the end of today?

completion_message.heading:
You carried enough
today.
completion_message.subheading: Letting go is its own kind of strength.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: what your body has been trying to tell you. Day 5 is about listening.

rituals.title: Your body is telling you something.
rituals.subtitle: It has been for a while.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What does your body
need to release right now?
release.field_placeholder: Tension, exhaustion, numbness — anything.

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Let your body
lead this breath.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Breathe into your belly, not your chest.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What does your body
need most today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
If your body could speak,
what would it say
it needs from you?

home_card.headline: Your body has been telling you something. Today, listen.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: At some point today, stop and scan your body slowly from head to feet. Name three sensations you notice — without trying to fix them.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Most burnout lives in the body long before the mind acknowledges it. Noticing without fixing is the first step toward understanding what you actually need.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What physical sensation do you keep ignoring?

rituals.notification_copy: Your body has been sending signals. Today, receive them.
rituals.evening_reflection: What did your body need today that you gave it — or didn't?

completion_message.heading:
You listened
to yourself today.
completion_message.subheading: That is a rare and important thing.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on being enough, exactly as you are. Day 6 is about enoughness.

rituals.title: You are enough for today.
rituals.subtitle: Not tomorrow. Not perfectly. Just today.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
You are not
too much or too little.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What expectation of yourself
are you ready to release?
release.field_placeholder: What are you expecting of yourself that isn't fair right now?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe in
what is true.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. You are enough in this breath.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What can you accept
about today as it is?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What does being enough
actually look like
for you today?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
Enough
was always true.
completion.subheading: Courage is accepting where you are.

home_card.headline: You are enough for today. That is not a small thing.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Say this out loud or write it: 'I am doing enough for where I am right now.' Notice how that lands — without arguing with it.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: The inner critic is loudest when you are already exhausted. Naming your enoughness — even reluctantly — interrupts the depletion cycle.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: Who told you that you needed to be more than you are?

rituals.notification_copy: You are enough for today. Just today.
rituals.evening_reflection: Where did you push too hard today because you didn't believe you were enough?

completion_message.heading:
You showed up
as yourself.
completion_message.subheading: That took more courage than you know.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: one week. Something has already shifted — come see what it is.

rituals.title: Something has quietly shifted.
rituals.subtitle: One week. It matters more than it looks.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What from this week
do you want to release?
release.subheading: You don't need to carry it into week two.
release.field_placeholder: What are you leaving here from the past seven days?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Seven breaths.
One for each day.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Let each breath mark a day you showed up.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What do you want to
protect in week two?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What has been different
about this week,
even subtly?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
One week
complete.
completion.subheading: Discipline lives in the small returns.

home_card.headline: One week in. Something quiet has already changed.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Look back at the past 7 days. Write one thing that surprised you about yourself — one thing you did that you weren't sure you would.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Seven days of returning is more than most people manage. Noticing what changed — even slightly — reinforces why it is worth continuing into week two.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What do you know about yourself now that you didn't know seven days ago?

rituals.notification_copy: Seven days. What does that say about you? Come find out.
rituals.evening_reflection: What feels different this evening compared to the evening seven days ago?

completion_message.heading:
One full week.
You stayed.
completion_message.subheading: The second week begins from a different place.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: a new arc begins. Finding your rhythm in the chaos.

rituals.title: Your attention is worth protecting.
rituals.subtitle: Calm is not passive. It is chosen.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What is pulling at your
attention right now?
release.subheading: You don't have to follow it.
release.field_placeholder: What keeps interrupting your focus?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Your attention
belongs to you.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Let other thoughts wait.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What deserves your
full attention today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would today look like
if your attention
was truly yours?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
Attention
reclaimed.
completion.subheading: Calm is a form of protection.

home_card.headline: Your attention is your most valuable resource. Protect it.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Pick one 5-minute window today. Close every tab except what you are working on. No notifications. Nothing else for those 5 minutes.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Every notification costs more than the time it takes to read — it fractures the focus that takes minutes to rebuild. One protected window changes how the day feels.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What steals your attention most often without your permission?

rituals.notification_copy: Before the noise takes over — one quiet moment.
rituals.evening_reflection: When did you lose your attention today? When did you reclaim it?

completion_message.heading:
You protected
your attention today.
completion_message.subheading: That is a quiet form of discipline.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on the power of one thing at a time.

rituals.title: One thing. That's all.
rituals.subtitle: Overwhelm shrinks when you name one thing.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
The list is long.
You need one thing.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What are you trying
to do too many of?
release.field_placeholder: Everything pulling at you right now.

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
One breath.
One step.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Focus narrows as you breathe.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What is the one thing
that matters most today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
If you could only do
one thing today,
what would it be?

home_card.headline: Overwhelm shrinks when you name one thing. Just one.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write your one most important task on a piece of paper. Put it somewhere visible. Do that before anything else today.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: The brain holds one clear intention well. When you add more, it fragments. One named priority changes not just what gets done — but how you feel doing it.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What do you tell yourself to justify taking on too many things at once?

rituals.notification_copy: One thing. Name it. Start there.
rituals.evening_reflection: Did you protect the one thing today? What got in the way?

completion_message.heading:
You focused
today.
completion_message.subheading: One thing done is not small.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on finding rhythm when the noise doesn't stop.

rituals.title: The noise will always be there.
rituals.subtitle: So will this moment.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What external noise
are you letting in today?
release.field_placeholder: What is making the most noise in your life right now?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe through
the noise.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. The noise is still there — so is your breath.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What can you do
despite the noise today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would you do
if you stopped waiting
for things to quiet down?

home_card.headline: The noise isn't going away. Neither are you.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Do one thing toward something that matters to you — something that takes less than 5 minutes. Not because the conditions are right. Just because you can.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Waiting for perfect conditions is a quiet form of avoidance. Small action in imperfect conditions builds a different kind of confidence.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What noise have you been using as a reason to wait?

rituals.notification_copy: The noise is still here. Something in you is still here too.
rituals.evening_reflection: What did you move forward today, even slightly?

completion_message.heading:
You kept moving
anyway.
completion_message.subheading: That is what momentum is built from.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on rest as rhythm — not as giving up, but as part of the practice.

rituals.title: Small rhythms become lifelines.
rituals.subtitle: You are allowed to not be in motion.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
You are allowed
to stop here.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What pace are you
trying to keep up with?
release.subheading: Is it yours, or someone else's?
release.field_placeholder: Whose pace are you running at right now?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Slow down
the breath first.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Slower than yesterday.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
Where can you create
one small pause today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What rhythm would feel
right for you today —
not for what is expected?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
Rhythm
restored.
completion.subheading: Rest is part of the practice.

home_card.headline: Small rhythms matter. You are allowed to slow down.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Find one 5-minute pause today. Sit somewhere different than usual, look out a window, or lie down. Do nothing useful during those 5 minutes.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: The nervous system doesn't regenerate mid-sprint — it regenerates in the pauses. Even 5 minutes of true stillness has a measurable effect on how you function for the rest of the day.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: When did rest start feeling like something you had to earn?

rituals.notification_copy: What happens when you stop for one moment? Find out today.
rituals.evening_reflection: Did you find a pause today? How did it feel to take it?

completion_message.heading:
You slowed down
today.
completion_message.subheading: That takes more courage than speeding up.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on calm — not as a destination, but as a state you carry.

rituals.title: Rest is not retreat.
rituals.subtitle: It is how you keep going.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What has been
exhausting you most?
release.field_placeholder: What is draining you that you haven't fully admitted?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Rest in
the exhale.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. The exhale is where rest lives.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
How can you be gentle
with yourself today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would a gentle
day look like
for you right now?

home_card.headline: Rest is not retreat. It is how you continue.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: At the end of the day, before sleep, spend 3 minutes doing nothing. No phone. No recap. Just rest in the quiet.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: The transition from active to rest is where many people stay stuck — scrolling instead of recovering. Three minutes of true stillness bridges that gap and tells your body it is safe.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What do you tell yourself rest should look like? Is that actually true?

rituals.notification_copy: Something is waiting in the quiet. Today you reach it.
rituals.evening_reflection: Where did you find calm today, even briefly?

completion_message.heading:
You rested
without guilt today.
completion_message.subheading: That is harder than it sounds.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on trusting what you cannot see yet.

rituals.title: You can trust the small steps.
rituals.subtitle: Even when you can't see the whole path.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
You don't need
to see the whole path.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What uncertainty are you
trying to resolve right now?
release.subheading: You can release the need to know.
release.field_placeholder: What don't you know that you wish you did?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Trust
the breath.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. You don't control the next inhale — it comes anyway.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What small step do you
trust yourself to take today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would you do today
if you trusted yourself
a little more?

home_card.headline: You don't need the whole path. Just the next step.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write down one thing you have been postponing because you are not sure it will work. Then take one small action on it — not the whole thing. Just one step.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Clarity rarely arrives before the step — it arrives after. The act of moving is what makes the path visible.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What would you do differently if you trusted the process a little more?

rituals.notification_copy: What if the next step is already clear? Open to find out.
rituals.evening_reflection: What became clearer today after you took a step?

completion_message.heading:
You trusted
the step today.
completion_message.subheading: Clarity follows action.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: two weeks. Something has already been built.

rituals.title: You've been steadier than you know.
rituals.subtitle: Two weeks. That is not nothing.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What story about yourself
are you ready to release?
release.subheading: The one that says this isn't working.
release.field_placeholder: What doubt have you been carrying about this?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe into
what you've built.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Two weeks of breath. It adds up.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What do you want
to protect in week three?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What evidence do you have
that you are more capable
than you thought?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
Two weeks.
You stayed.
completion.subheading: Discipline is just returning. Again and again.

home_card.headline: Two weeks of returning. That is real discipline.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write a brief note to yourself: what you have noticed, what has changed, what you are quietly proud of — even if the pride feels small.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Acknowledging what you have built is not vanity — it is data. It shows your brain that the effort is creating something real. That makes continuing feel less abstract.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What have you learned about yourself in the past two weeks?

rituals.notification_copy: Two weeks in. There is something you have not noticed yet.
rituals.evening_reflection: What is different about tonight compared to two weeks ago?

completion_message.heading:
Two weeks complete.
You are building something.
completion_message.subheading: The third week changes things.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: a new arc begins. Rebuilding trust with yourself.

rituals.title: You are becoming someone.
rituals.subtitle: Not suddenly. Quietly.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What old version of yourself
are you ready to let go of?
release.subheading: Just a little. That is enough.
release.field_placeholder: Who are you becoming that you haven't fully admitted yet?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe into
who you're becoming.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Inhale what is growing. Exhale what is passing.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
Who do you want to be
by the end of today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What is one thing the new
version of you
would do today?

home_card.headline: You are becoming someone. Not suddenly. Quietly.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write the name of one person you respect. Write one quality they have. Write one small way you can practice that quality today.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Identity doesn't change through insight — it changes through action. Practicing one quality, even imperfectly, creates new patterns for who you are becoming.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: Who are you becoming that you haven't yet given yourself permission to be?

rituals.notification_copy: You are not the same person who started. Look closer.
rituals.evening_reflection: What moment today felt most like who you are becoming?

completion_message.heading:
You moved
toward yourself today.
completion_message.subheading: Identity is built in moments like this.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on courage — what it actually means to show up when it's hard.

rituals.title: Showing up is courage.
rituals.subtitle: Even when no one sees it.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What fear have you been
carrying in silence?
release.field_placeholder: What are you afraid to admit you're afraid of?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Courage begins
with one breath.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Brave people breathe slowly.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What courageous small act
can you do today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would you do today
if you were just
10% less afraid?

home_card.headline: Showing up is the courageous act. Even when it's hard.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Do one thing today that makes you slightly uncomfortable. Not reckless — just slightly outside your comfort zone. Name it before you do it.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Courage is not the absence of fear — it is the decision to move despite it. Each small act of courage rewires your relationship with discomfort over time.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What are you avoiding out of fear that you're calling something else?

rituals.notification_copy: Showing up today is a courageous act. Even this.
rituals.evening_reflection: Where did courage show up for you today, even in small form?

completion_message.heading:
You were brave
today.
completion_message.subheading: In the small ways that matter most.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on the gap — between who you are and who you are becoming.

rituals.title: The gap between then and now.
rituals.subtitle: You have already changed more than you see.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
The distance between
then and now is real.
arrival.subheading: You don't have to cover it all today.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What gap in yourself
are you judging right now?
release.field_placeholder: Where do you feel behind?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Rest in
the progress.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. You have come further than you think.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What progress can you
acknowledge today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What did your past self need
that your present self
is slowly becoming?

home_card.headline: The gap is smaller than it looks. You are already across it.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write one thing you could not do 30 days ago that you can do today — even something that seems small. Write it plainly.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Progress is rarely visible while it is happening. Actively naming it closes the gap between effort and belief — and makes continuing feel worth it.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What change in yourself are you not yet giving yourself credit for?

rituals.notification_copy: The gap is smaller than it looks from the inside.
rituals.evening_reflection: What progress did you witness in yourself today, even a trace of it?

completion_message.heading:
You are further
than you know.
completion_message.subheading: Rest before the next stretch.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on trusting what you already know.

rituals.title: You know more than you think.
rituals.subtitle: The clarity was always there.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
You already know
more than you admit.
arrival.subheading: This space helps you hear it.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What do you know to be true
that you've been ignoring?
release.field_placeholder: The thing you already know but haven't said yet.

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Clarity comes
after stillness.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Let the breath quiet the noise.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What does your gut
tell you to do today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What do you already know
about yourself that you
haven't yet acted on?

home_card.headline: You already know the answer. Today is for trusting it.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Ask yourself: 'What do I know I should do that I keep not doing?' Write the answer. Then take one small step toward it — just one.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Most people don't lack clarity — they resist it because acting on it requires change. Naming what you know converts insight into action.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What have you known for a long time that you keep postponing?

rituals.notification_copy: You already know. Today is for trusting that.
rituals.evening_reflection: Did you trust what you already knew today? What happened?

completion_message.heading:
You listened
to yourself today.
completion_message.subheading: That is self-trust in action.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on staying focused in the middle of noise.

rituals.title: Clarity comes after the chaos.
rituals.subtitle: Not instead of it.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
The chaos is still there.
So is this.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What mental fog
have you been living inside?
release.subheading: Name it. Begin to see through it.
release.field_placeholder: What feels most unclear right now?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe through
the fog.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Clarity waits on the other side of this breath.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What is one thing
you can see clearly today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would you focus on
if the fog were just
slightly less thick?

home_card.headline: Clarity doesn't replace the chaos. It lives alongside it.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write 3 things you are currently confused about. Then circle the one that actually matters most. Start there — even one small step.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Overwhelm thrives in vagueness. Naming what is unclear and prioritizing within it reduces the cognitive load. You don't solve everything — you know what matters first.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What would become clearer if you stopped trying to hold everything at once?

rituals.notification_copy: Clarity doesn't come before the chaos. It comes after.
rituals.evening_reflection: What became clearer today? What is still foggy — and is that okay?

completion_message.heading:
You saw through
the fog today.
completion_message.subheading: Clarity grows from here.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on quiet momentum and what is slowly building in you.

rituals.title: Small acts compound quietly.
rituals.subtitle: You are further along than the noise suggests.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What are you comparing
your progress to?
release.field_placeholder: Whose measure are you using for yourself?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe into
the quiet.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. What is building cannot always be seen.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What small act today
would make tomorrow easier?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What is building in you
that you haven't yet been
willing to acknowledge?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
Quietly
building.
completion.subheading: Calm creates space for compound progress.

home_card.headline: Small acts compound. You are further along than you see.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Think of one habit you have built in the past 20 days — even a small one. Write down what that habit might quietly become in a year.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Compound growth is invisible in the short term and undeniable in the long term. Naming what is building activates your brain's reward system and makes continuing feel worthwhile.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What quiet progress have you been too busy to notice?

rituals.notification_copy: Small things compound. What you're building is real.
rituals.evening_reflection: What small act from today might matter more later than it seems right now?

completion_message.heading:
Twenty days
of quiet building.
completion_message.subheading: The momentum is real.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: three weeks. You are different now.

rituals.title: 21 days. You're different now.
rituals.subtitle: Not loudly. But really.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
Three weeks.
You came back every time.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What old pattern
are you ready to release now?
release.subheading: You have earned the right to let it go.
release.field_placeholder: What habit or thought is finally ready to leave?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Three weeks
of breath.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Each breath marks a day you chose yourself.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What identity are you
stepping into today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What is the most significant
thing that has
changed in you?

home_card.headline: 21 days. You are not the same person who started.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write a message to yourself from the perspective of Day 1. What would that person think of where you are right now?

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Perspective letters show you the distance you have traveled — distance that is invisible from where you are currently standing.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: Who have you been becoming these past three weeks?

rituals.notification_copy: 21 days. Something in you has already shifted.
rituals.evening_reflection: What is the most significant thing different about you compared to three weeks ago?

completion_message.heading:
Three weeks complete.
You persisted.
completion_message.subheading: The final arc begins.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: a new arc. This is becoming who you are.

rituals.title: Protect what is working.
rituals.subtitle: You've built something worth guarding.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
The final arc
begins here.
arrival.subheading: What you have built is worth protecting.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What threatens
what you've built?
release.subheading: Name it. Protect yourself from it.
release.field_placeholder: What is the biggest risk to what you have created?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Root into
what you've built.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Feel the ground beneath what you have built.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What will you
protect first today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What have you built
in the past 22 days
that deserves protection?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
Protected.
Rooted.
completion.subheading: Courage means guarding what is working.

home_card.headline: You've built something worth protecting. Guard it today.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Identify one habit or practice from the past 22 days that is working. Write one specific thing you will do to protect it this week.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Growth requires not just building, but protecting. Most good habits die not from lack of effort but from unprotected exposure to the same conditions that created the problem.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What is working in your life right now that you haven't fully acknowledged?

rituals.notification_copy: You've built something worth protecting. Guard it today.
rituals.evening_reflection: What did you protect today? What threatened what you have built?

completion_message.heading:
You are rooting
into something real.
completion_message.subheading: Protection is an act of courage.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on depth — and why going slow matters more than going fast.

rituals.title: Depth over speed.
rituals.subtitle: The ones who go deep go further.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
There is nowhere
to rush to.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What are you trying
to rush through right now?
release.field_placeholder: What are you speeding through that deserves more of you?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe slowly
and deeply.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Depth comes from the long exhale.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
Where can you go
deeper today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would change if you traded
speed for depth —
even for one hour?

home_card.headline: The ones who go deep go further. Depth over speed.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Choose one task today and spend 5 extra minutes on it. Not to perfect it — to understand it more fully than you normally would.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Speed creates output. Depth creates understanding. In burnout recovery, depth is also a form of rest — it asks you to slow down and be present with what you are doing.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: Where in your life has speed been costing you more than you have admitted?

rituals.notification_copy: Depth over speed today. Go further by going slower.
rituals.evening_reflection: Where did you go deeper today? How did it feel compared to rushing?

completion_message.heading:
You went deeper
today.
completion_message.subheading: That is a different kind of progress.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on stillness — and what quiet builds in you.

rituals.title: The quiet ones go the furthest.
rituals.subtitle: Stillness is not absence. It is presence.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
The quiet
is safe here.
arrival.subheading: Stillness is its own form of strength.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What noise are you
ready to let go of?
release.subheading: For now. Not forever. Just now.
release.field_placeholder: What noise are you tired of carrying?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Let the quiet
in.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. This is what stillness sounds like.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
Where can you bring
quiet today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What does stillness feel like
for you when you
actually allow it?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
Quiet
and steady.
completion.subheading: Stillness is a form of strength.

home_card.headline: The quiet ones go the furthest. Let yourself be still.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Find 5 minutes of complete silence today — no music, no podcast, no background noise. Just sit and be. Nothing to accomplish.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Chronic noise keeps the nervous system in low-grade alert. Five minutes of deliberate silence is physiologically different from distracted quiet. Your brain needs this.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: When is the last time you sat in true silence without feeling like you should be doing something?

rituals.notification_copy: Quiet is not empty. It is where you find yourself.
rituals.evening_reflection: Where did you find stillness today? How did it feel in your body?

completion_message.heading:
You found stillness
today.
completion_message.subheading: That is harder than it looks.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on enough — returning to where you began.

rituals.title: Still enough. Always enough.
rituals.subtitle: Coming back to where you started.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
You are still enough.
You were always enough.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What 'not enough' story
keeps coming back?
release.subheading: Set it down. You already are.
release.field_placeholder: What doubt about your enoughness is still visiting?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe in
enoughness.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Enough is not a destination — it is where you already are.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What is one way you are
already enough for today?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would you stop worrying
about if you truly believed
you were enough?

home_card.headline: Still enough. Always enough. You haven't changed that.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write: 'I am enough for today because ___.' Complete it with something true — even something small. Don't argue with what you write.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Enoughness is not a feeling that comes naturally under stress — it requires active acknowledgment. Writing it down anchors the belief in a way that thinking about it rarely can.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: Where did the idea that you weren't enough first come from?

rituals.notification_copy: Still enough. Always were. Always will be.
rituals.evening_reflection: At what point today did you forget you were enough? What happened?

completion_message.heading:
You remembered
you were enough.
completion_message.subheading: That is the whole practice.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on return — and what it means to come back.

rituals.title: Every return is a beginning.
rituals.subtitle: Even this one. Especially this one.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
You are back.
Again.
arrival.subheading: Every return is its own beginning.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What shame about returning
have you been carrying?
release.field_placeholder: What makes returning feel hard?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Return
to the breath.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Returning is the whole practice.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What are you returning
to today — in yourself?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What becomes possible
when you stop judging yourself
for needing to return?

home_card.headline: Every return is a beginning. This one counts too.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Think of something you have returned to after stopping — a habit, a relationship with yourself, an intention. Write what coming back taught you.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Return is not failure — it is the practice itself. The gap between leaving and returning is where most of the growth lives. Understanding that changes how you see setbacks.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What do you always come back to, no matter how many times you leave?

rituals.notification_copy: Every return brings something new. What is yours today?
rituals.evening_reflection: What did returning feel like today? What did it teach you?

completion_message.heading:
You returned
to yourself again.
completion_message.subheading: Clarity comes from this practice.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: on practice — and what it means that this has become yours.

rituals.title: This is the practice now.
rituals.subtitle: Not something you're building. Something you are.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
This is not
something you're doing.
arrival.subheading: This is becoming who you are.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What old version of yourself
has the practice replaced?
release.field_placeholder: What is this practice replacing in you?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
This breath
is the practice.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. This is not preparation. This is it.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What does showing up
mean to who you are now?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
If this is now
part of who you are,
what else becomes possible?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
The practice
is yours.
completion.subheading: This is who you are now.

home_card.headline: This is not something you're building anymore. This is who you are.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write: 'I am someone who ___.' Complete it with one habit or quality that is now genuinely true of you — not what you want to be, what you already are.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Identity-based language creates the most durable behavioral change. 'I am someone who...' attaches behavior to self-concept in a way that goals and resolutions cannot.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What is now true about you that wasn't true 27 days ago?

rituals.notification_copy: Not building anymore. This is who you are now.
rituals.evening_reflection: In what moment today did this feel like something you are — not something you're doing?

completion_message.heading:
The practice
is part of you.
completion_message.subheading: That is what 27 days builds.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: almost there. Let yourself feel what that means.

rituals.title: Almost a month. Feel that.
rituals.subtitle: What you've done here is not small.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
Almost thirty days.
You stayed.
arrival.subheading: What you have done here is real.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What do you want to release
before the final two days?
release.subheading: Make space for what is coming.
release.field_placeholder: What do you want to leave behind before month one closes?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Breathe into
what you've built.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Almost a month of this. Let it land.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What do you want
to carry into month two?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What does almost a month
of choosing yourself
actually mean to you?

home_card.headline: Almost a month of choosing yourself. That is not small.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write down one thing you are proud of from the past 28 days. Do not minimize it. Write it plainly and let it be true.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Pride is not arrogance — it is accurate acknowledgment. Stating what you are proud of, without immediately qualifying it, is a difficult but important act of self-recognition.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What does 28 days of showing up say about who you are?

rituals.notification_copy: Almost a month. You have done what most people never do.
rituals.evening_reflection: What does it feel like to be this close to one month?

completion_message.heading:
Almost there.
Already more than most.
completion_message.subheading: Two days remain.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: one day before the end of month one.

rituals.title: Tomorrow you'll have done this.
rituals.subtitle: And that changes everything.

arrival.label: RESET RITUAL
arrival.heading:
Tomorrow you will have
completed a month.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What are you most relieved
to have let go of this month?
release.subheading: Name it. It deserves to be named.
release.field_placeholder: What heaviness has this month lifted?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
One day left.
One breath.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. Tomorrow this breath will have become a month.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What do you want
to feel tomorrow?
intention.subheading: Name the feeling. Begin it today.

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
What would it mean to yourself
to finish
what you started?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
One more day.
You will finish.

home_card.headline: Tomorrow you'll have done this. Today is the step that gets you there.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write one message to the person you will be tomorrow — after completing 30 days. What do you want them to know?

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Writing to your future self generates forward momentum and creates psychological commitment. You are not just continuing a habit — you are delivering on a promise to yourself.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: What does it feel like to be one day away from completing something you started?

rituals.notification_copy: One day left. What will tomorrow feel like?
rituals.evening_reflection: How does tonight feel different from the night you started?

completion_message.heading:
One more step
tomorrow.
completion_message.subheading: You are already what it takes.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Tomorrow: Day 30. One month complete.

rituals.title: Thirty days of choosing yourself.
rituals.subtitle: This is permanent now.

release.label: RELEASE
release.heading:
What does the old version
of you need to release?
release.field_placeholder: What has this month changed that you can finally let go of?

breath.label: BREATHE
breath.heading:
Thirty days
of this breath.
breath.instruction: Follow the circle. This is what thirty days of returning looks like.

intention.label: ONE INTENTION
intention.heading:
What do you want to carry
into month two?

moment.label: A MOMENT
moment.heading:
Who are you now
that you weren't when
you first opened this?

completion.label: RESET COMPLETE
completion.heading:
Thirty days.
Complete.
completion.subheading: This is who you are now.

home_card.headline: Thirty days of choosing yourself. That is something permanent.

today_action.title: Today's Action
today_action.content: Write a short note to the person who will start Day 1 next month. Tell them one thing they need to know — from someone who has been where they are starting.

why_it_matters.title: Why it matters
why_it_matters.content: Teaching others is how we consolidate what we have learned. Writing this note clarifies your own journey — and creates something generous out of what you have built.

reflection.title: Reflection
reflection.content: Who are you now that you weren't 30 days ago?

rituals.notification_copy: Thirty days. What has changed in you? Open to see.
rituals.evening_reflection: What does it feel like to have arrived here? What is next?

completion_message.heading:
One month complete.
You rebuilt something.
completion_message.subheading: This is not the end. It is the beginning of the person you now know you can be.
completion_message.whats_ahead: Month two begins when you are ready. You know how to return now.
